title: Align zebra stripes to day markers

log.context: Align zebra stripes to day markers

Done. The zebra stripes in `/mnt/data/hello-world/timeline.html` now use the midpoint (`offsetLeft + offsetWidth/2` on desktop, `offsetTop + offsetHeight/2` on mobile) of each day label element as the stripe boundary, so stripes are centered on the day markers on both edges. Committed as `01bf867` and pushed to `main`.
